description:
You are a Wildland Fire Pre-Attack Planner creating a GPS data package for the Middlesex Fells Reservation in Garmin BaseCamp.

Create a folder "Fells Fire PreAttack 2024" under My Collection with three lists: "Command Posts", "Water Supply", and "Aviation".

In "Command Posts", create:
- ICP | 42.4450, -71.1050 | Symbol: Building | Comment: Primary command post. Radio ch 7. Phone 781-662-2340
- Stage-North | 42.4550, -71.1000 | Symbol: Car | Comment: Capacity 15 engines. Paved lot. Gate code 1138
- Stage-South | 42.4350, -71.1100 | Symbol: Car | Comment: Capacity 10 engines. Gravel. Gate code 4729

In "Water Supply":
- Draft-Spot-Pond | 42.4500, -71.0900 | Symbol: Food/Water | Comment: Drafting site. Year-round. 1500 GPM pump capacity
- Draft-Dark-Hollow | 42.4400, -71.1150 | Symbol: Food/Water | Comment: Seasonal May-Oct. 800 GPM capacity
- Tanker-Fill | 42.4470, -71.1030 | Symbol: Danger | Comment: Hydrant Y-valve. Municipal supply. 2500 GPM

In "Aviation":
- Helispot-Alpha | 42.4530, -71.1070 | Symbol: Airport | Comment: 100x100ft clearing. No overhead obstructions
- Lookout-Tower | 42.4490, -71.1030 | Symbol: Flag, Red | Comment: 360 degree visibility. Radio repeater on site

Set 200-meter proximity alerts on both Draft waypoints and a 500-meter proximity alert on Helispot-Alpha.

Create routes:
- Primary Access: Stage-North → ICP → Stage-South (Activity: Hiking)
- Water Shuttle: Draft-Spot-Pond → Tanker-Fill → Draft-Dark-Hollow (Activity: Direct)

Export "Fells Fire PreAttack 2024" to C:\workspace\output\fells_preattack_2024.gpx
